title: Sherwin-Williams (SHW)Intrinsic Value
description: We ran a full discounted cash flow on The Sherwin-Williams Company using actual financials. One number. Every assumption disclosed. Here's what SHW is really worth.

fcfGrowth.title: FCF Growth Rate (Y1-Y5)
fcfGrowth.rationale:
" data-astro-cid-6knfkj3v>
Sherwin-Williams is an established dividend aristocrat with pricing power. While revenue growth may be single-digit, strong operating margins, share buybacks, and efficient capital allocation allow Free Cash Flow to compound at a healthy mid-to-high single-digit clip.
